author: anon-ab6221f8
content: P1.1 scaffolding complete. 5 commits on feat/429-crosslink-dashboard: (1) design doc, (2) dashboard subcommand + serve deprecation, (3) per-user SQLite bootstrap, (4) dashboard/ prune, (5) rust-embed SPA bundling. End-to-end: crosslink dashboard binds, serves embedded bundle, SPA fallback works for client-side routes, /api/* paths still 404 correctly. 4731 tests pass.
